ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the patient at the time of data collection */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Patient's ethnicity */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Patient's education level */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of neurological conditions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who has this diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Clinical diagnosis of the patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Study ID related to this diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications prescribed to the patient */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_metrics" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with this imaging record */,
  "visit" TEXT /* Visit number for the imaging study */,
  "mmscore" INTEGER /* MMSE score of the patient during the visit */,
  "thickness_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing various thickness metrics for brain regions */,
  "volume_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing various volume metrics for brain regions */,
  "cortical_thickness" REAL /* Average cortical thickness */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date of image acquisition */,
  "scanner_type" TEXT /* Type of scanner used */,
  "scanner_software" TEXT /* Scanner software version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research organization (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the operation */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the operation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
